$description: Component tokens for Mobile Knob — the draggable slider handle with optional icon overlay and Default/Disabled states. Extends Knob Container with state-dependent background color and an optional centered icon. iOS renders as a CSS pill; Android uses SVG image assets (one per state). Figma Reference: Node ID 359-20831

$component.name: Knob
$component.description: The interactive drag handle used in all Slider variants. Built on top of Knob Container — adds Default and Disabled states that change the background color, and supports an optional centered icon overlay (18px). In Default state the knob is white; in Disabled state it turns gray/600 (dark). Android uses separate SVG image assets for each state. The Knob carries a drop shadow on its outer wrapper (not on the inner pill element).
$component.structure: Outer positioned div (drop-shadow filter). Inner absolute div (the KnobContainer shape: pill/circle with border). Optional centered icon overlay (18px, absolute centered).

property1.Disabled: Gray/600 background — non-interactive, slider is locked

property2.iOS: Pill shape (38×24px), CSS-rendered. Shadow applied as drop-shadow filter on outer wrapper.
property2.Android: Circle shape (24×24px), SVG image asset per state.

variants.icon: boolean — when true, a placeholder icon (18px) is centered inside the knob

subComponents.knobContainer: knob-container.json — the base shape, border, and shadow tokens

usage.contexts: Used inside Slider (Simple, Range, Segment types) and Icon Knob. Not used standalone.
usage.features: 2 states, 2 platforms, optional icon overlay, pill (iOS) or circle (Android) shape, drop shadow

shadow.description: Mobile knob outer wrapper drop shadow - shadow/md: 0px 2px 4px -2px rgba(16,24,40,0.06), 0px 4px 8px -2px rgba(16,24,40,0.10) (applied as CSS drop-shadow filter on the outer knob wrapper)

width.description: Mobile knob border width - 1px solid (consistent across both states for iOS)

color.description: Mobile knob border color - gray/400 - #98a2b3 (same for both Default and Disabled states)

ios.description: Mobile knob iOS border radius - fully rounded pill (rounded-[100px] in Figma; same as Knob Container)

android.description: Mobile knob Android border radius - full circle (rounded-[300px] in Figma; applied to the SVG container)
Mobile knob Android size - 24×24px (square bounding box)

color.$comment: Background color keyed by state. Border color is gray/400 for both states.

background.description: Mobile knob Default state background color - white (active/interactive handle)
Mobile knob Disabled state background color - gray/600 - #475467 (iOS only; Android uses a separate SVG asset for the disabled state)

icon.$comment: Optional placeholder icon centered inside the knob. Not shown in all Slider variants — presence controlled by the 'icon' prop.

size.description: Mobile knob icon size - 18px (centered inside the 24px or 38×24px knob shell)

default.description: Mobile knob icon color for Default state - gray/700 - #344054 (icon shown on white background)

disabled.description: Mobile knob icon color for Disabled state - white (icon shown on gray/600 dark background)
